title: Furniture review research: understanding Service personnel experiences
body: "MOD provide a furniture provision to Service personnel and their families who live in Service Family Accommodation (SFA) in the UK. MOD are undertaking a review of this furniture provision, with the aim of delivering a fair, modern and sustainable furniture provision.  To inform the review, MOD designed a qualitative research project to understand Service personnel’s experiences of using the existing furniture provision and assess their need for a furniture provision in the future. The results of this research will help MOD understand Service personnel needs for a future furniture provision, including any areas of improvement to current policy.  The research report contains the research objectives, methodology and findings. "
